UG-20  DESIGN TEMPERATURE. (a) The maximum design temperature used in design shall not be less than the mean metal temperature expected under operating conditions. Design temperature shall be established as required by UG-22. (b) The minimum design metal temperature (MDMT) shall be determined in accordance with the rules of UCS-66, except as permitted by UCS-67. (c) When the design temperature exceeds the limits for the material group, the maximum allowable stress shall be reduced as specified in UG-23. For impact test requirements at low temperatures, see UG-84. Vessels in cyclic service shall also comply with UG-22(d).
